voting_subheading: Pick your favorite to cast your vote
tip_line_subheading: Know a potato dish we missed? Drop us a tip!
tip_line_disclaimer: This is all for fun! We'll ignore inappropriate suggestions at our discretion.
tip_submitter_name_placeholder: For credit if we add your dish
tip_success: Thanks for the tip! We'll review your submission.
tip_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
tip_error_rate_limited: Too many submissions. Please try again later.
vote_error_rate_limited: Whoa there, hot potato! You've been voting a lot. Let the steam cool off and try again in a bit.
my_spud_subtitle: Slide to set your perfect potato preferences
my_spud_help_body: Each slider represents a potato preference. Slide toward the end you prefer. The further you slide, the more it matters to you. Leave a slider in the center if you don't care about that quality. For example: Love crispy snacks? Slide Crispiness toward 'Crunchy'. Prefer comfort food? Slide Richness toward 'Indulgent'.
my_spud_error_no_prefs: Slide at least one preference to find your match!
my_spud_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
